settings.text: Stop Looking Tired, Even When You’re Not.

settings.custom_liquid:
Eliminates dark circles & under-eye bags
Smooths fine lines
Increases firmness
Gentle & painless

settings.breaks_captions: Variant 1 caption, Variant 2 caption, Variant 3 caption

settings.heading: Why It's Work
settings.content:
Liftora eye patches use painless micro-channel technology to deliver targeted ingredients beneath the skin’s surface — where traditional creams simply can’t reach.

No invasive procedures.

No complicated routines.

Just a smarter approach designed to help reduce the appearance of dark circles, under-eye bags, and visible signs of fatigue — for a sharper, more rested, more confident look.

settings.heading: How To Use It
settings.content:
• Apply the patches for 2 hours or leave them on overnight.
  • They target the most visible signs of fatigue — dark circles, under-eye bags, and fine lines.
  • Easy to remove, revealing a fresher, brighter-looking gaze by morning.

settings.heading: Details
settings.content:
What’s Included

  • 1 Pack = 1 Pair (2 under-eye patches)
  • Single-use patches designed for one full application

Key Benefits

  • Helps visibly brighten and refresh tired-looking eyes
  • Supports smoother-looking skin and a firmer appearance
  • Cooling, lightweight feel for a soothing experience
  • Comfortable fit that stays in place during wear

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content:
1. Niacinamide — helps brighten and even the look of the under-eye area
  2. Hyaluronic Acid — deeply hydrates for a smoother, plumper appearance
  3. Caffeine — helps reduce the look of puffiness and under-eye bags
  4. Vitamin C & Retinol — help smooth and improve the appearance of fine lines

settings.title: The Secret to a Fresher, Younger-Looking Gaze
From Looking Exhausted… To Looking Sharp Again.
settings.text:
It’s not just about dark circles.

Before Liftora, your eyes can make you look older, drained even when you feel strong inside.

After Liftora, your eyes look brighter, firmer, more awake.

And suddenly… people stop asking if you’re tired.

A next-generation micro-needle patch designed to deliver instant, filler-like plumping safely, comfortably, and at home.

This advanced patch uses ultra-fine, self dissolving microneedles to deliver a filler inspired formula beneath the skin’s surface where visible smoothing begins.

settings.benefit: Helps Reduce Dark Circles & Under-Eye Bags

settings.title: Amazing
settings.text: I rarely leave reviews, but this time… I’m 46 years old and I’ve had these under-eye bags for years, even when I sleep well. I tried everything (creams, roll-ons, gel patches), but nothing really worked. After just 2–3 applications, I started to notice an improvement… and in just over a week, my eyes look less tired and I feel like I look younger.
settings.author: Jordan B.

settings.title: Perfect for Sensitive Skin
settings.text: I naturally have very sensitive skin and had absolutely no issues. It also helped reduce the puffiness under my eyes.
settings.author: Mickael P.

settings.title: Visible Results in Just a Few Uses
settings.text: Top quality! After 3 uses, I’m already starting to see results on my dark circles 👍
settings.author: James W.

settings.title: Visible Results in Just a Few Uses
settings.text: “I had a big insecurity for a long time. The worst was hearing people say, ‘Did you not sleep?’ — even when I did… I waited 8 days before leaving a review just to be sure, and I’m really happy: my under-eye bags are noticeably reduced. I truly recommend it.
settings.author: Garyy W.

settings.title: Gentle Yet Effective — Even for Sensitive Skin
settings.text: I can confirm it doesn’t hurt at all (I was worried because of the word microneedles). My skin is sensitive and I had zero irritation. I personally saw visible results in less than 2 weeks. I look less ‘tired,’ and it clearly changes the face
settings.author: Lee J-L.

settings.title: From Tired Eyes to a Fresh, Brighter Look
settings.text: I always looked exhausted. I tried these patches without really believing in them… and honestly, I didn’t expect this. My eyes look much fresher, and most importantly, that dark tone that made me look sad is finally gone.
settings.author: Harry. J.

settings.title: Simple, Practical & Travel-Friendly
settings.text: I really like the format — each sachet contains two eye patches. It’s simple, quick, and super convenient for traveling.
settings.author: Logan Q.

settings.title: I Look More Awake Now.
settings.text: After a few uses, my eyes look fresher and less tired. People stopped asking if I’m exhausted.
settings.author: Mael Z.

settings.title: Finally Something That Works.
settings.text: Simple to use, no complicated routine. My under-eye bags look less noticeable, especially in the morning.
settings.author: Mark H.

settings.title: Subtle But Noticeable.
settings.text: I didn’t want anything invasive. Liftora helps me look sharper and more rested on work calls.
settings.author: Pierre I.

settings.title: Trusted By Men Who Want To Look Sharper
settings.subtitle: Excellent [rating] / 5 [rating_stars]
